details: The agent ran the correct command to list releases, but the results it reported (v2026.3.23, v2026.3.22, v2026.3.22-beta.1) do not match the known correct answers (v2026.3.13-1, v2026.3.13-beta.1, v2026.3.12). The agent misinterpreted the data - it appears the jq command retrieved releases from a different date than expected, suggesting either the data was stale/incorrect or the agent read incorrect data from the output file. The final answer is factually wrong compared to the known facts.
